scripts.prebuild: npm run build -w @novel-master/core && npm run build -w @novel-master/cloud-sync-driver-s3 && npm run build -w @novel-master/tdbc-driver-better-sqlite3 && npm run build -w @novel-master/tokenizer-driver-node && npm run build -w @novel-master/sksp-windows && npm run build -w @novel-master/sksp-mac
scripts.build: npm run build:icons && vite build && npm run build:main && npm run build:preload
scripts.dev:electron: node scripts/rebuild-native.mjs && npm run build:main && npm run build:preload && node scripts/start-electron.mjs
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev:vite" "wait-on tcp:5173 && npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dist: npm run build && node scripts/rebuild-native.mjs && electron-builder
scripts.clean: node --input-type=module --eval "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })"
